results.rendered_html: mandodarI f. N. of Rāvaṇa's favourite wife (daughter of Maya and mother of Indra-jit; she advised her husband to deliver Sītā to Rāma, but he did not heed her; she is regarded as one of the five very chaste women, the other four being Ahalyā, Draupadī, Sītā, and Tārā),  MBh. ;  R.  &c.

results.rendered_html:
mandodarī (manda + udara) f. N. pr.
1〉 der ältesten Gemahlin Rāvaṇaʼs, einer Tochter Mayaʼs,  MBH. 3,16181 .  R. 5,14,30 . 24,36 . 56,87 . 6,33,8 . 95,2 .  KATHĀS. 45,144 .  BHĀG. P. 9,10,24 . Inschr. in  Journ. of the Am. Or. S. 7,25, Śl. 3 .  Verz. d. B. H. No. 943 . 1209 .  Verz. d. Oxf. H. 139,b,12 . mandodarīśa m. Bein. Rāvaṇaʼs  TRIK. 2,8,6 . ˚suta m. der Sohn der M. d. i. Indrajit  H. 706 .  JAṬĀDH. _im_ ŚKDR. 
— 2〉 einer der Mütter im Gefolge des Skanda  MBH. 9,2635 .
— 3〉 der Mutter des Lexicographen Jaṭādhara  Verz. d. Oxf. H. 189,b, No. 434 .
